overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city. The character traverses elevated walkways, covered corridors, and descends stairs while surrounded by towering skyscrapers, digital billboards, and sparse crowds in a rain-slicked cyberpunk metropolis.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated walkway overlooking traffic and neon billboards below

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard displaying purple neon advertisement with woman's face
green and red neon billboard advertising burritos
glass and metal walkway with transparent floor sections overlooking street
raised pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street canyon
tall buildings covered with glowing red and blue corporate advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated glass walkway overlooking a busy multi-lane street in a futuristic city. Neon billboards and corporate signage illuminate the scene, with moderate traffic visible on the road below and skyscrapers rising in the distance.

events.description: enters covered neon-lit corridor from open elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through covered corridor with reflective floors and neon lighting

notable_agents.action: walking in opposite direction through the corridor

entered.detail: enclosed roof structure with integrated lighting
cyan neon tube lights framing the corridor walls and ceiling
wet-look reflective marble floor mirroring the neon lights
transparent glass walls showing the city outside
large green digital advertisement for All Foods Burrito

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered corridor with reflective marble floors and cyan neon lighting. The space is moderately crowded with pedestrians walking in both directions, and glass walls reveal the city outside while digital advertisements line the interior walls.

events.description: begins descending staircase to lower level

notable_agents.action: descending stairs while holding a black umbrella

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal edges descending to lower level
metal handrails along both sides of the staircase
large purple billboard becomes visible again as character turns

segments.scene_description: The character turns and begins descending a concrete staircase to a lower level. The large purple billboard becomes visible again through the open side of the stairwell, and other pedestrians including one with an umbrella walk down alongside.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower promenade with palm trees and digital billboards

events.description: reaches bottom of stairs and continues along lower walkway
passes pedestrians seated on benches under palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking along lower promenade past benches and palm trees

notable_agents.action: sitting on bench looking at phone

entered.detail: large palm trees in rectangular concrete planters with bench seating
modern concrete bench seating along the walkway
wide pedestrian walkway with reflective wet surface

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the bottom of the stairs and continues along a lower promenade lined with palm trees in planters and concrete benches. The large purple billboard now dominates the right side of the frame at close range, while pedestrians sit on benches and others walk along the wet reflective walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated urban vantage point down into a rain-slicked lower promenade. It begins with the character walking along a glass walkway overlooking a busy multi-lane street filled with neon corporate signage and distant skyscrapers. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a covered corridor where reflective marble floors and cyan lighting blend with the digital advertisements of a crowded pedestrian thoroughfare. The camera then follows the character as they turn to descend a concrete staircase, momentarily revealing a massive purple billboard through the open side of the stairwell. Finally, the movement concludes on a lower promenade lined with palm trees and concrete benches, where the towering purple billboard dominates the view over a wet, reflective walkway.
